text:
Created attachment 233245
Patch to update devel/ammonite to 2.5.3

Hi,

I've attached a patch to update devel/ammonite to 2.5.3.

Changelog
---------

- Print error positions in Scala 3
- Add support for Scala 3.1.2
- Bump uPickle to 1.6.0

Kind regards,

Jens
